name: plan-ceo-review
description: BAT framework for product decisions - Brand/Attention/Trust scoring

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run pack-skill
scripts.pack-skill: mkdir -p ../../dist-skills && tar -czf ../../dist-skills/plan-ceo-review.skill.tar.gz -C .. plan-ceo-review/dist plan-ceo-review/skill.json plan-ceo-review/cli.js plan-ceo-review/package.json --exclude='*.map'
